failures.description: The Executor misread or ignored the catalog search result showing one matching item priced at $46.13 and incorrectly concluded that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The agent correctly planned and called the catalog tool. The tool output at index 3 returned one matching item with price 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later.
